roa.docketEntryComment: PROB TRANSFER TO SONOMA COUNTY SENT
/CAL:APD 1203,9 TRANSFER TO SONOMA/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERREDFROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SONOMA COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:SENTENCE/X:RESPONSE TO SENTENCING BRIEF FILED,/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1D/CTS:1/24MREVIEW/DNACOMP/IND/DEF:SHALL COMPLETE 100 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE/RESTV/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X:AS TO COUNTS 2 & 3, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCE TO 1 DAY IN COUNTY JAIL  WITH 1 DAY CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED,/X:SENTENCE ON EACH COUNT IS CONCURRENT,/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/BE/

/CAL:PLEA/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO REDUCE COUNTS 2 & 3 PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) ISGRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/IBARRA/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENTPLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 1/FNDG/CO:OPEN PLEA TO THE COURT/ARBUCKLE/TWS/CONTD:SENTENCE/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET AND PRE-PLEA REPORT/CONTD:CHANGE OF PLEA/DOP/DEF:IS PERMITTEDTO TRAVEL TO MEXICO TO SETTLE RESTITUTION ISSUE,/
/CAL:TO SET/CGTW/TE:1 DAY/CTORD:PRE-PLEA REPORT BY APD/PRES: 02-10-16/CONTD:RECEIPT OF PRE-PLEA REPORT & TO SET/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
